title: Better Forge Chat Reforged Reworked
description: Better Forge Chat Reborn Reworked (Forge 1.20.1): customizable chat formatting + LuckPerms/FTB nicknames, /msg + /r, click-to-reply (/ans) with logs, announcements, word filters, admin chat/helpop, MOTD, banned items.
body:
# ЁЯТм Better Forge Chat Reborn Reworked (BFCRR) тАФ **PluginтАСLike Server Management for Forge** A **server-side Forge mod** for **Minecraft 1.20.1** that brings a *plugin-style* chat + staff toolkit to your Forge server тАФ **without** running hybrid servers (no Bukkit/Magma/Arclight/dual-stack required). тЬЕ **Forge:** 1.20.1 (Forge) тЬЕ **Mod Version:** 1.0 тЬЕ **Mod ID:** `bfcrrmod` тЬЕ **Main Command:** `/bfcrr` --- ## тнР Why BFCRR? (The pitch) If you want the **utility and admin power** of plugins тАФ announcements, filters, staff chat, help request pipelines, item enforcement, MOTD tools тАФ but you run a **Forge** server and donтАЩt want to deal with hybrid server stacksтАж this is for you. BFCRR is a **fully configurable server utility suite** centered around chat, identity, moderation and staff workflow: - ЁЯОи **Full chat formatting pipeline**: timestamps, player name formatting, configurable message formats - ЁЯМИ **HEX colors + gradients** support (permission controlled) for modern looking chat - ЁЯзй **LuckPerms** prefixes/suffixes + **FTB Essentials** nicknames integration (optional) - ЁЯТМ **Private messaging** with `/msg` + `/r` + **toggle private chat mode** - ЁЯз╖ **Click-to-reply** to any message with `/ans` + **chat logging** - ЁЯУг **Announcements engine**: text announcements, command announcements, and title announcements - ЁЯз╝ **Word filter**: replace or remove words/phrases - ЁЯзСтАНтЪЦя╕П **HelpOp** (player тЖТ staff) + ЁЯФР **Admin Chat** (private staff channel) - ЁЯУМ **Op Bulletin** (operator notes board) - ЁЯЪл **Banned Items enforcement** (auto scanning/removal + block placement prevention) - ЁЯз╛ **MOTD system** (edit/activate/preview/apply from in-game) --- # ЁЯМИ HEX Colors (Emphasis: YES) BFCRR supports: - ЁЯОи Classic `&` color codes - тЬи **HEX colors** via `&#RRGGBB` (example: `&#FF5500Hello World`) - ЁЯМИ **Gradients** (when enabled via permissions) ### ЁЯФР PermissionтАСbased control (server friendly) You can control who can use: - Basic colors: `bfcrrmod.chat.colors` - Styles: `bfcrrmod.chat.styles` - Markdown styling: `bfcrrmod.chat.styles.md` - тЬи **HEX + gradients**: `bfcrrmod.chat.colors.hex` - Individual `&` colors: `bfcrrmod.chat.colors.0-f` This means you can give: - тЬЕ Regular players: limited colors - тЬЕ Donors: more colors + styles - тЬЕ Staff: full HEX/gradient privileges --- # ЁЯзй Optional Integrations These are optional. BFCRR works without them, but becomes even stronger with them. ## ЁЯП╖я╕П LuckPerms - Prefixes/suffixes shown in chat + (optional) tab list - Plays perfectly with permission-based formatting policies ## ЁЯзСтАНЁЯОд FTB Essentials - Nickname integration support --- # тЪЩя╕П Configuration (quick but useful) Main config: `config/bfcrrmod-common.toml` ### ЁЯз▒ Core formatting keys - `playerNameFormat` (default: `$prefix$name$suffix`) - `chatMessageFormat` (default: `$time | $name: $msg`) - `chatMessageColor` - `timestampFormat` - `metaJoinSeparator` ### ЁЯзй Module toggles (turn systems on/off) - `enableAnnouncements` - `enableFilterSystem` - `enableMessagingSystem` - `enableChatReplies` + `replySummaryLength` - `enableHelpOp` - `enableAdminChat` - `enableBannedItems` - `enableMotdSystem` + `applyMotdOnStartup` --- # ЁЯза Systems & Utilities (Detailed) ## ЁЯОи 1) Chat Formatting + Timestamps + Markdown Make chat look professional and consistent. тЬЕ Features: - ЁЯХТ Timestamps (`enableTimestamp`, `timestampFormat`) - ЁЯОи Color/style formatting (`&` codes) - тЬНя╕П Markdown formatting (`markdownEnabled`) - ЁЯзй Placeholders everywhere **Message example format (default idea):** - `"$time | $name: $msg"` --- ## ЁЯзН 2) Identity: Prefix/Suffix + Nicknames + Tab List BFCRR builds a тАЬplayer identity layerтАЭ (like plugins do): - ЁЯП╖я╕П Prefixes/suffixes (LuckPerms metadata) - ЁЯзСтАНЁЯОд Nicknames (FTB Essentials, or integrated nicknames if enabled) - ЁЯУЛ Tab list metadata + nicknames (config toggles) --- ## ЁЯТМ 3) Private Messaging System (PluginтАСstyle DMs) ### Commands - `/msg ` (aliases: `/m`, `/tell`, `/w`, `/pm`) - `/r ` ### ЁЯФБ Toggle DM Mode (super useful for staff & trading) - `/msg ` тЖТ all your chat goes ONLY to that player - `/msg` or `/r` (no args) тЖТ exit DM mode, back to public chat тЬЕ Extras: - ЁЯЦ▒я╕П Click messages to quick-reply - ЁЯз▓ Hover text configurable (`clickToMessageHover`) - ЁЯФК Sound notification (`enableMsgSound`) --- ## ЁЯз╖ 4) ClickтАСtoтАСReply System (`/ans`) + Chat Logs A plugin-like тАЬreply to that exact messageтАЭ workflow. ### Command - `/ans ` ### How it works 1. Chat lines (and announcements) become clickable 2. Hover shows тАЬclick to replyтАЭ (configurable: `clickToReplyHover`) 3. Clicking auto-fills `/ans ` for you 4. Type reply and send ### ЁЯЧГя╕П Logging - Saved to: `logs/chat/chat_YYYY-MM-DD_HH-mm-ss.log` - Great for moderation and context tracking ### ЁЯФФ Sound notifications - Reply sound toggle: `enableReplySound` - Permission for notification: `bfcrrmod.ans.notify` --- ## ЁЯУг 5) Announcement Engine (Text + Commands + Titles) This is a full тАЬplugin announcementsтАЭ system inside Forge. ### тП▒я╕П Scheduling highlights - Uses server clock scheduling - Supports `1S`, `30M`, `1H`, and combos like `1H30M15S` - Minimum interval: `1S` - Offset behavior helps reduce synchronized spam bursts ### ЁЯУЭ Text Announcements - `/textannouncement add "" ` - Fires immediately, then repeats - `/textannouncement ontime "" [target]` - `/textannouncement modify "" ` - `/textannouncement remove ` - `/textannouncement list [page]` тЬЕ Multi-line support with `
` ### тЪЩя╕П Command Announcements - `/commandannouncement add ` - `/commandannouncement remove ` - `/commandannouncement list [page]` ### ЁЯП╖я╕П Title Announcements - `/titleannouncement "" ["<subtitle>"]` ### ЁЯСд Player preferences - `/toggle` to list toggleable announcements - `/toggle <id>` to enable/disable per-player **Permission controls:** - Manage announcements: `bfcrrmod.announcements.manage` - Toggle announcements: `bfcrrmod.announcements.toggle` - Bypass toggles: `bfcrrmod.announcements.bypass` - Use title announcements: `bfcrrmod.announcements.title` --- ## ЁЯз╝ 6) Word Filter System (replace/remove phrases) Server-side filtering for moderation and quality control. ### Commands - `/bfcrr filter add <id> <yes|no> "<word>" [replacement]` - `/bfcrr filter remove <id>` - `/bfcrr filter list [page]` тЬЕ Use it for: - profanity filters - anti-spam phrases - auto-replacements **Permissions:** - Manage: `bfcrrmod.filter.manage` - Bypass: `bfcrrmod.filter.bypass` --- ## ЁЯзСтАНтЪЦя╕П 7) HelpOp (Player тЖТ Staff pipeline) A clean тАЬrequest helpтАЭ workflow like youтАЩd expect from plugins. ### Commands - `/helpop <message>` - `/helpopop <player> <message>` (anonymous staff reply) тЬЕ Features: - Click-to-reply for staff - ЁЯФК configurable sounds (`enableHelpOpSound`) - Staff recipients: OP Level 2+ or `bfcrrmod.helpop.receive` --- ## ЁЯФР 8) Admin Chat (Private Staff Channel) A private channel that stays private. ### Commands - `/chat admin` (toggle) - `/ac <message>` (send once) тЬЕ Features: - Keeps staff coordination out of public chat - Designed to prevent тАЬmessage leakingтАЭ behavior (especially important with Discord relays) **Permissions:** - Use: `bfcrrmod.adminchat.use` - See: `bfcrrmod.adminchat.see` --- ## ЁЯУМ 9) Op Bulletin (Operator Notes Board) A lightweight in-game staff bulletin board. ### Commands - `/opbulletin [page]` - `/opbulletin add <text>` - `/opbulletin remove <id>` тЬЕ Features: - Pagination (5 items per page) - Click navigation + click to remove - Formatting support --- ## ЁЯЪл 10) Banned Items System (auto-enforced item rules) This is a **server utility** system that behaves like a plugin ban-list, but inside Forge. ### Commands - `/banned [page]` (everyone can view) - `/banned add <description>` (ban held item) - `/banned remove <item_id>` - `/banned clear` - `/banned scan` - `/banned scantime [set <ticks>]` - `/banned scantimeblocks [set <ticks>]` тЬЕ Enforcement: - Scans player inventories at intervals - Scans containers + cursor items - Scans armor/offhand slots - Scans Curios slots if installed - Prevents placing banned blocks - Optional placed-block scanning + removal: - `enableBannedBlockScanning` - `bannedBlockScanRadius` - `bannedBlockScanInterval` --- ## ЁЯз╛ 11) MOTD System (Server List MOTD management) Edit and manage server MOTDs directly in-game (plugin-style workflow). ### Commands - `/bfcrr motd list [page]` - `/bfcrr motd add <text>` - `/bfcrr motd set <index> <text>` - `/bfcrr motd remove <index>` - `/bfcrr motd activate <index>` - `/bfcrr motd apply` - `/bfcrr motd preview <index>` - `/bfcrr motd clear` тЬЕ Supports: - `&` color codes - `<br>` line breaks - Auto-apply on startup: `applyMotdOnStartup` --- # ЁЯЧВя╕П Data Storage / Files ### Server-wide config `config/bfcrr/` - `common.toml` - `motd.json` ### Per-world data `<world>/serverconfig/bfcrr/` - `announcements.json` - `announcement_prefs.json` - `filters.json` - `banned_items.json` - `banned_config.json` - `bulletin.json` ### Logs `logs/chat/` - `chat_<timestamp>.log` --- # тЬЕ Commands (Quick Index) - `/bfcrr info|colors|test|reload` - `/colors` - `/msg`, `/r`, `/ans` - `/helpop`, `/helpopop` - `/chat admin`, `/ac` - `/opbulletin` - `/banned ...` - `/bfcrr motd ...` - `/textannouncement ...` - `/commandannouncement ...` - `/titleannouncement ...` - `/toggle` - `/bfcrr filter ...` --- # ЁЯзк Notes / Compatibility - тЬЕ Built for Forge servers (works on client too, but features are server-focused) - тЪая╕П Other chat-overhaul mods may conflict (common for chat pipeline mods) - тЬЕ Avoids hybrid server complexity: **Forge utilities without Bukkit/Spigot stacks** --- **┬й 2022-2026 EnVy**
